description: Self JOIN on the same table using different aliases

columns.name: manager_name
columns.note: RIGHT side of LEFT JOIN: m.name becomes nullable for employees with no manager

name: self_join
query_sql:
-- @name GetEmployeesWithManagers
-- @returns :many
SELECT e.id, e.name, m.name AS manager_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.manager_id = m.id
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE employees (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, manager_id INTEGER REFERENCES employees(id))

sqlc_comparison.scythe_improvement: scythe correctly marks manager_name as nullable due to LEFT JOIN on self-referencing table
sqlc_comparison.sqlc_behavior: sqlc marks manager_name as non-nullable because employees.name is NOT NULL
